SHORT NAME: FED_SRVC_CTGRY_CD 

LONG NAME: FED_SRVC_CTGRY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header
